name: Éire Rangers
description: Irish guerrilla fighters. Fianna warriors, extra priests, limited heavy equipment.
add_rules: Anointed Ammunition: Armour-Piercing Bullets available for 5D each (Limit: 2).
Berserker: Lieutenant or one Shock Trooper can become Berserker for +15D. Cannot have Armour (shields OK). NEGATE FEAR. Never gains BLOOD MARKERS.
Carnyx: One Musical Instrument gains FEAR keyword at no extra cost.
Fianna: Shock Troopers can gain INFILTRATOR and SKIRMISHER keywords for +10D each.
Followers of Saint Patrick: Patron is always a Learned Saint.
Hit & Run Tactics: -1 DICE to Melee Attacks targeting models retreating from combat.

Light Infantry: Max 1 MHI. Up to 4 Combat Engineers (Satchel Charges Limit: 4). Max 3 models with Great Sword/Axe (not MHI). Only MHI can have HEAVY Ranged/Melee weapons (except Great Sword/Axe). Only MHI can have Reinforced/Machine Armour.
Loose Formation: Lieutenant replaces Hold Your Fire! with SKIRMISHER keyword (no cost change).
Strong in Faith: 0-2 Trench Clerics. Clerics replace Onward Christian Soldiers with Arise and be Healed! ACTION + Away Serpents! ACTION.

Lieutenant.add: Loose Formation: Friendly within 6" gain +1 DICE to Risky for Dash.

Shock Trooper: Warband limit: 1. NEGATE FEAR. Ignore Blood Markers. Cannot wear Armour.
Lieutenant: Warband limit: 1. NEGATE FEAR. Ignore Blood Markers. Cannot wear Armour.
